from typing import TypedDict

class UserProfile(TypedDict, total=False):
    name: str
    email: str
    bio: str
    avatar_url: str
    phone: str

def format_user_display(profile: UserProfile) -> str:
    return f"{profile['name']} <{profile['email']}>"

def get_user_bio(profile: UserProfile) -> str:
    return profile["bio"]

def build_avatar_tag(profile: UserProfile) -> str:
    url = profile["avatar_url"]
    return f'<img src="{url}" />'

def send_sms(profile: UserProfile, message: str):
    phone = profile["phone"]
    print(f"Sending SMS to {phone}: {message}")
